Heading: BUG IT
Details: From tracking down hidden bugs to untangling messy code, our participants proved their debugging mettle! Huge congratulations to our winner, Akash S (S4 EEE), for flawlessly clearing every round with speed and accuracy.

Heading: BUG IT
Details: An online debugging showdown where participants raced to find and fix complex code errors. The event challenged students' logical thinking and code analysis skills, rewarding those with the sharpest eyes and the fastest solutions.

Heading: Gitflow3.0
Details: session designed to  master the power of Git and GitHub. This hands-on session covered  basic Git commands for version control, collaboration, and project management, led by Ms Merin Rose Tom, Senior Software Engineer at Oracle.

Heading: Algorithms With Python
Details: This introductory series was successfully conducted to provide students with a strong foundation in Python and algorithmic logic.

Heading: Trivia Night
Details: a competitive trivia challenge exploring the principles, history, and impact of the FOSS movement. After a spirited competition, we are proud to announce our winner :Bharat Raj (S3 EC)

Heading: Trivia Night
Details: an interactive quiz to explore the world of Free and Open Source Software. Participants competed to test their knowledge of FOSS history, principles, and the technologies that power today’s tech careers
